title: dictamnus albus subsp. caucasicus
intro: Dictamnus albus subsp. caucasicus, also known as Caucasian poppy or Caucasian Dictamnus, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Caucasus region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Dictamnus albus subsp. caucasicus include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used internally or topically for therapeutic purposes.
